channel.title: Feather Autoweb Improvements
channel.description: Autonomous improvements to the Feather web application

item.title: Add session sort button — cycle between Latest, Most msgs, Oldest sort order in sidebar with localStorage persistence, command palette integration (96 tests pass)
item.description: Add session sort button — cycle between Latest, Most msgs, Oldest sort order in sidebar with localStorage persistence, command palette integration (96 tests pass)

item.title: Add line number gutter to code blocks (3+ lines) — positioned left gutter with border separator, auto-skips short snippets, integrates with existing copy button flow (95 tests pass)
item.description: Add line number gutter to code blocks (3+ lines) — positioned left gutter with border separator, auto-skips short snippets, integrates with existing copy button flow (95 tests pass)

item.title: Add Ctrl+Shift+C (Cmd+Shift+C) keyboard shortcut to copy last assistant message — copies raw markdown to clipboard with toast feedback, added to command palette and shortcuts help modal (94 tests pass)
item.description: Add Ctrl+Shift+C (Cmd+Shift+C) keyboard shortcut to copy last assistant message — copies raw markdown to clipboard with toast feedback, added to command palette and shortcuts help modal (94 tests pass)

item.title: Add 'Open in new tab' to session context menu — right-click sessions to open in new browser tab via hash routing for side-by-side comparison (93 tests pass)
item.description: Add 'Open in new tab' to session context menu — right-click sessions to open in new browser tab via hash routing for side-by-side comparison (93 tests pass)

item.title: Add character count indicator to message input — shows char count while typing, gold highlight at 500+ chars (WebSocket threshold), compact 2.5k format for 1000+ chars (92 tests pass)
item.description: Add character count indicator to message input — shows char count while typing, gold highlight at 500+ chars (WebSocket threshold), compact 2.5k format for 1000+ chars (92 tests pass)

item.title: Add desktop notifications when assistant finishes while tab is in background — Notification API with permission request on first send, working->idle transition trigger, command palette toggle, localStorage persistence (91 tests pass)
item.description: Add desktop notifications when assistant finishes while tab is in background — Notification API with permission request on first send, working->idle transition trigger, command palette toggle, localStorage persistence (91 tests pass)

item.title: Add copy button to tool result output — hover reveals Copy button (top-right) on tool result pre blocks, copies raw output to clipboard with Copied\! feedback; mobile: always-visible at 0.6 opacity (90 tests pass)
item.description: Add copy button to tool result output — hover reveals Copy button (top-right) on tool result pre blocks, copies raw output to clipboard with Copied\! feedback; mobile: always-visible at 0.6 opacity (90 tests pass)

item.title: Add recent sessions quick-access cards to empty state — shows top 3 non-autoweb sessions with title, time, and message count for fast navigation when no session is selected (89 tests pass)
item.description: Add recent sessions quick-access cards to empty state — shows top 3 non-autoweb sessions with title, time, and message count for fast navigation when no session is selected (89 tests pass)

item.title: Add session right-click context menu — star/unstar, copy session ID, export Markdown, mark as read; positioned at cursor, closes on click-outside/Escape (88 tests pass)
item.description: Add session right-click context menu — star/unstar, copy session ID, export Markdown, mark as read; positioned at cursor, closes on click-outside/Escape (88 tests pass)

item.title: Sticky date separators in message list — date headers (Today/Yesterday/Mar 15) pin to top when scrolling long sessions like Slack/WhatsApp, with pill-shaped label and solid background (87 tests pass)
item.description: Sticky date separators in message list — date headers (Today/Yesterday/Mar 15) pin to top when scrolling long sessions like Slack/WhatsApp, with pill-shaped label and solid background (87 tests pass)

item.title: Add export session as Markdown — command palette entry (Ctrl+K > Export) fetches all messages, formats as Markdown with user/assistant headings and tool call blocks, triggers .md file download (86 tests pass)
item.description: Add export session as Markdown — command palette entry (Ctrl+K > Export) fetches all messages, formats as Markdown with user/assistant headings and tool call blocks, triggers .md file download (86 tests pass)

item.title: Add tool call duration display — shows elapsed time (1.2s/5s/1m 23s) on tool result headers during live SSE streaming, hidden for batch history loads (84 tests pass)
item.description: Add tool call duration display — shows elapsed time (1.2s/5s/1m 23s) on tool result headers during live SSE streaming, hidden for batch history loads (84 tests pass)

item.title: Add pulsing gold running dot on tool call headers — dot appears when tool_use is rendered, auto-removed when tool_result arrives via tool_use_id matching, cleared on history load (83 tests pass)
item.description: Add pulsing gold running dot on tool call headers — dot appears when tool_use is rendered, auto-removed when tool_result arrives via tool_use_id matching, cleared on history load (83 tests pass)

item.title: Shorten file paths in tool call headers — shortenFilePath() strips /home/*/... prefixes to show meaningful tail (src/main.rs instead of /home/feather-dev/feather-dev/src/main.rs) in Read/Write/Edit/Grep previews (82 tests pass)
item.description: Shorten file paths in tool call headers — shortenFilePath() strips /home/*/... prefixes to show meaningful tail (src/main.rs instead of /home/feather-dev/feather-dev/src/main.rs) in Read/Write/Edit/Grep previews (82 tests pass)

item.title: Add file language badges (Rust, JS, Python, etc.) to Read/Write/Edit/Grep/Glob tool call headers — colored pill badges based on file extension for quick scanning (81 tests pass)
item.description: Add file language badges (Rust, JS, Python, etc.) to Read/Write/Edit/Grep/Glob tool call headers — colored pill badges based on file extension for quick scanning (81 tests pass)

item.title: Thinking block collapsed preview — shows first 80 chars of thinking text + word count when collapsed, hidden when expanded; CSS + JS change with new test (80 tests pass)
item.description: Thinking block collapsed preview — shows first 80 chars of thinking text + word count when collapsed, hidden when expanded; CSS + JS change with new test (80 tests pass)

item.title: Server-side pagination: backend 'before' param for reverse pagination + frontend limit=200 initial load, load-earlier fetches 50-message chunks from server (79 tests pass)
item.description: Server-side pagination: backend 'before' param for reverse pagination + frontend limit=200 initial load, load-earlier fetches 50-message chunks from server (79 tests pass)

item.title: Fix SSE reconnect race condition — added tailReconnectTimer guard so onerror/heartbeat timeout cannot spawn overlapping reconnection attempts (MEDIUM priority from known issues)
item.description: Fix SSE reconnect race condition — added tailReconnectTimer guard so onerror/heartbeat timeout cannot spawn overlapping reconnection attempts (MEDIUM priority from known issues)

item.title: Add session ID validation to API endpoints — is_valid_session_id() rejects path traversal and malformed IDs in 6 handlers (Phil priority: reject malformed IDs early)
item.description: Add session ID validation to API endpoints — is_valid_session_id() rejects path traversal and malformed IDs in 6 handlers (Phil priority: reject malformed IDs early)

item.title: Add auto-scroll reliability — capture-phase image/video/iframe load handler on #messages re-scrolls when media loads and user is at bottom, plus double-rAF in scrollToBottom for layout-shift correction (Phil: auto-scroll reliability fixes)
item.description: Add auto-scroll reliability — capture-phase image/video/iframe load handler on #messages re-scrolls when media loads and user is at bottom, plus double-rAF in scrollToBottom for layout-shift correction (Phil: auto-scroll reliability fixes)

item.title: Add Ctrl+B (Cmd+B) keyboard shortcut to toggle sidebar — standard IDE shortcut, added to keydown handler, command palette (shows shortcut badge), and shortcuts help modal (75 tests pass)
item.description: Add Ctrl+B (Cmd+B) keyboard shortcut to toggle sidebar — standard IDE shortcut, added to keydown handler, command palette (shows shortcut badge), and shortcuts help modal (75 tests pass)

item.title: Add session timestamp auto-refresh — sidebar relative times (now/5m/2h) update every 30s via data-last-updated attribute, so timestamps stay accurate without full re-render
item.description: Add session timestamp auto-refresh — sidebar relative times (now/5m/2h) update every 30s via data-last-updated attribute, so timestamps stay accurate without full re-render

item.title: Add full timestamp tooltip to session sidebar times — hovering relative time (now/6m/2h) shows full date-time in ET (formatFullTime helper), 73 tests pass
item.description: Add full timestamp tooltip to session sidebar times — hovering relative time (now/6m/2h) shows full date-time in ET (formatFullTime helper), 73 tests pass

item.title: Add SSE heartbeat timeout (60s) for zombie connection detection — forces reconnect when no SSE data arrives, preventing silent disconnections from going unnoticed (Phil: harden SSE reliability)
item.description: Add SSE heartbeat timeout (60s) for zombie connection detection — forces reconnect when no SSE data arrives, preventing silent disconnections from going unnoticed (Phil: harden SSE reliability)

item.title: Show Bash tool description in collapsed header preview — displays human-readable description (e.g. 'Build Rust binary') instead of raw command in tool call headers when description field is available
item.description: Show Bash tool description in collapsed header preview — displays human-readable description (e.g. 'Build Rust binary') instead of raw command in tool call headers when description field is available

item.title: Add Alt+Up/Down keyboard shortcuts to switch between sessions — wraps around, shown in shortcuts modal and command palette (70 tests pass)
item.description: Add Alt+Up/Down keyboard shortcuts to switch between sessions — wraps around, shown in shortcuts modal and command palette (70 tests pass)

item.title: Fix command palette filter commands — was using non-existent sessionFilter/applySessionFilter(), now correctly calls setSessionFilter(); also added Toggle theme command to palette
item.description: Fix command palette filter commands — was using non-existent sessionFilter/applySessionFilter(), now correctly calls setSessionFilter(); also added Toggle theme command to palette

item.title: Fix What's New badge timestamp comparison — badge now shows dot when newest change is newer than last-seen instead of only when never viewed, with lightweight page-load check via checkWhatsNewBadge()
item.description: Fix What's New badge timestamp comparison — badge now shows dot when newest change is newer than last-seen instead of only when never viewed, with lightweight page-load check via checkWhatsNewBadge()

item.title: Add clear (X) button to session search input — hidden by default, appears when search has text, clears input and refocuses on click; also shows/hides keyboard shortcut hint accordingly
item.description: Add clear (X) button to session search input — hidden by default, appears when search has text, clears input and refocuses on click; also shows/hides keyboard shortcut hint accordingly

item.title: Remove all bare .unwrap() calls from Rust handlers — added epoch_secs/epoch_millis helpers, replaced 18 unwrap() with expect/unwrap_or_default (Phil priority: panic-proof error handling)
item.description: Remove all bare .unwrap() calls from Rust handlers — added epoch_secs/epoch_millis helpers, replaced 18 unwrap() with expect/unwrap_or_default (Phil priority: panic-proof error handling)

item.title: Add unread message count (N) prefix to browser tab title — users can see new activity from other tabs, synced with existing unread badge via incrementUnread/resetUnread calling updatePageTitle
item.description: Add unread message count (N) prefix to browser tab title — users can see new activity from other tabs, synced with existing unread badge via incrementUnread/resetUnread calling updatePageTitle

item.title: Add What's New changelog popover — 'New' button in header opens scrollable popover showing 15 most recent kept improvements with timestamps, click-outside close, localStorage tracking (from Phil's feature list)
item.description: Add What's New changelog popover — 'New' button in header opens scrollable popover showing 15 most recent kept improvements with timestamps, click-outside close, localStorage tracking (from Phil's feature list)

item.title: Add session starring — star/pin button on sidebar sessions, starred sort to top with Starred group header, localStorage-backed, command palette integration
item.description: Add session starring — star/pin button on sidebar sessions, starred sort to top with Starred group header, localStorage-backed, command palette integration

item.title: Add unread session indicators — gold dot on sidebar sessions with new activity since last viewed, tracked via sessionViewTimes in localStorage (from Phil's feature list)
item.description: Add unread session indicators — gold dot on sidebar sessions with new activity since last viewed, tracked via sessionViewTimes in localStorage (from Phil's feature list)

item.title: Add command palette (Ctrl+K) — searchable action launcher with 13 commands, arrow key navigation, Enter to execute, Escape to close; replaces old focus-input shortcut
item.description: Add command palette (Ctrl+K) — searchable action launcher with 13 commands, arrow key navigation, Enter to execute, Escape to close; replaces old focus-input shortcut

item.title: Fix SSE exponential backoff bug — moved tailReconnectDelay to module scope so backoff persists across reconnection attempts instead of resetting to 1s each time
item.description: Fix SSE exponential backoff bug — moved tailReconnectDelay to module scope so backoff persists across reconnection attempts instead of resetting to 1s each time

item.title: Add copy buttons to user messages — hover reveals Copy button (top-right) on user bubbles with data-raw-content for clipboard, mobile always-visible at 0.6 opacity, matching assistant message behavior
item.description: Add copy buttons to user messages — hover reveals Copy button (top-right) on user bubbles with data-raw-content for clipboard, mobile always-visible at 0.6 opacity, matching assistant message behavior

item.title: Add rotating fun status phrases (25 phrases like Scampering, Razmatazzing, Beboppin) — replaces hardcoded 'Ready, spaghetti' with readyStatus() that picks a random phrase each time (fixes HIGH status text issue)
item.description: Add rotating fun status phrases (25 phrases like Scampering, Razmatazzing, Beboppin) — replaces hardcoded 'Ready, spaghetti' with readyStatus() that picks a random phrase each time (fixes HIGH status text issue)

item.title: Fix iOS Safari viewport height — added -webkit-fill-available and 100dvh progressive enhancement, fixed test-session-filter-toggle to use is_autoweb instead of removed AUTOWEB_PATTERN
item.description: Fix iOS Safari viewport height — added -webkit-fill-available and 100dvh progressive enhancement, fixed test-session-filter-toggle to use is_autoweb instead of removed AUTOWEB_PATTERN

item.title: Collapsible user messages — long prompts (>300 chars or >8 lines) auto-collapse with Show more/less toggle, gradient fade, accent-colored link; applied to addUserMessage and addUserMessageWithImages
item.description: Collapsible user messages — long prompts (>300 chars or >8 lines) auto-collapse with Show more/less toggle, gradient fade, accent-colored link; applied to addUserMessage and addUserMessageWithImages

item.title: Dynamic favicon and title showing session status — green F icon when idle, gold when working (Thinking/Running tool), red when disconnected; browser tab shows session name and status prefix (no test — visual only)
item.description: Dynamic favicon and title showing session status — green F icon when idle, gold when working (Thinking/Running tool), red when disconnected; browser tab shows session name and status prefix (no test — visual only)

item.title: URL linkification in user messages — bare https:// URLs now rendered as clickable accent-colored links (target=_blank), applied across all 5 user message rendering paths
item.description: URL linkification in user messages — bare https:// URLs now rendered as clickable accent-colored links (target=_blank), applied across all 5 user message rendering paths

item.title: Add in-chat message search (Ctrl+F) — search bar with gold-highlighted matches, 1/N counter, Enter/Shift+Enter prev/next navigation, Escape to close, added to keyboard shortcuts modal
item.description: Add in-chat message search (Ctrl+F) — search bar with gold-highlighted matches, 1/N counter, Enter/Shift+Enter prev/next navigation, Escape to close, added to keyboard shortcuts modal

item.title: Add session keyboard navigation — ArrowUp/ArrowDown highlights sessions in sidebar search, Enter selects; blue highlight style, blur clears, documented in shortcuts modal
item.description: Add session keyboard navigation — ArrowUp/ArrowDown highlights sessions in sidebar search, Enter selects; blue highlight style, blur clears, documented in shortcuts modal

item.title: Restore Ctrl+N (Cmd+N) keyboard shortcut for new Pi session (lost in prior edits) + add to shortcuts help modal
item.description: Restore Ctrl+N (Cmd+N) keyboard shortcut for new Pi session (lost in prior edits) + add to shortcuts help modal

item.title: Add message_count to Session API response and display in sidebar session list — users can now see message counts (e.g. 148 msg) next to relative time for each session
item.description: Add message_count to Session API response and display in sidebar session list — users can now see message counts (e.g. 148 msg) next to relative time for each session

item.title: Search highlight in session filter — matching substring in titles gets gold highlight (.search-highlight) when filtering sessions, also fixed title XSS by escaping non-search titles
item.description: Search highlight in session filter — matching substring in titles gets gold highlight (.search-highlight) when filtering sessions, also fixed title XSS by escaping non-search titles

item.title: Fix markdown links to open in new tab (target=_blank rel=noopener) — prevents navigating away from Feather when clicking links in messages
item.description: Fix markdown links to open in new tab (target=_blank rel=noopener) — prevents navigating away from Feather when clicking links in messages

item.title: Removed 4 AUTOWEB regex patterns (CRITICAL #5) — isAutowebSession now uses server-side is_autoweb flag with minimal 2-line fallback, deleted ~20 lines of fragile NLP/regex matching
item.description: Removed 4 AUTOWEB regex patterns (CRITICAL #5) — isAutowebSession now uses server-side is_autoweb flag with minimal 2-line fallback, deleted ~20 lines of fragile NLP/regex matching

item.title: Added collapse/expand all tool calls toggle button (wrench icon) in input toolbar — collapses/expands all tool-call and tool-result bodies at once, with per-session state and auto-show/hide based on tool presence
item.description: Added collapse/expand all tool calls toggle button (wrench icon) in input toolbar — collapses/expands all tool-call and tool-result bodies at once, with per-session state and auto-show/hide based on tool presence
